notes.text: This advisory aggregates security fixes for the tigervnc SRPM in CIQ LTS for Rocky Linux 8.8. It addresses 12 CVEs: CVE-2023-5367, CVE-2023-5380, CVE-2023-6377, CVE-2023-6478, CVE-2023-6816, and 7 more.
